ddls:
CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the horse in kilograms */,
  "current_hr_rating" INTEGER /* Current Handicap Rating (HR) of the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current owner of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current trainer of the horse */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the horse */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "pedigree" TEXT /* Pedigree information of the horse */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the owner */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner acquired the horse */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner ceased ownership of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the trainer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone of the trainer */,
  "stables_location" TEXT /* Location of the stables managed by the trainer */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse that participated in the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location where the race was held */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the race in meters */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the horse to complete the race */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the horse in the race */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Prize money won by the horse, if any */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey who rode the horse */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the race track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership transfer */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse being transferred */,
  "from_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner transferring the horse */,
  "to_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new owner of the horse */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the ownership transfer */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ownership transfer */,
  "transfer_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the ownership transfer, if any */,
  "transfer_document" TEXT /* Reference to the legal document of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_transfers_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_transfers_to_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_transfers_from_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse being trained */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer conducting the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., speed, endurance) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations from the training session */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the training session */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes on the horse's performance during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)
